title: 12,000 up to 54,853 people in India on my site in 20 minutes, THEN 70 in an instant?! WFT??

enrichment.summary: Kyle watches his real-time analytics tool show an explosive surge of visitors from India on his website, climbing from roughly 25,000 to over 54,000 users in one country within minutes, then abruptly dropping to 70. He marvels at the numbers while noting his site analytics otherwise show only 12,000 users over a two-week period, calling the discrepancy bizarre.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Fascinated and amused by the surge but recognizes something is off given the contradiction with his two-week stats
Has never made money from his site and wonders if high traffic could finally be worth something
Finds it weird and suspicious — calls it 'some weird shit'
